'''Wister''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

==Biography==
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] known as Wister was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] elite [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]<ref name="A Day in the Life">{{Tales|12|A Day in the Life}}</ref> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> He flew with the Rogues When the Alliance struck at the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] unfinished [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] in that year, in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="CSWE Wister">{{CSWECite|III|332|Wister}}</ref> Temporarily renamed [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] for the battle, the Rogues [[Starfighter combat/Legends|scored]] a large number of [[Death/Legends|kills]] and remained mostly intact, even as their fellow [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] were devastated by the Imperial [[Space warfare/Legends|defense]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 5 Wedge">[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi'', Second Edition]]</ref>

The Alliance won the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] when the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] was destroyed,<ref name="Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref> and they maintained a presence at Endor for some [[Time/Legends|time]].<ref name="Marvel 100">[[Star Wars (1977) 100|''Star Wars'' (1977) 100]]</ref> Not long after the battle, Wister was flying as [[Rogue Two/Legends|Rogue Two]] alongside [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Rogue Three/Legends|Rogue Three]] [[Kirst (pilot)|Kirst]]. When they came across the wreckage of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] on the surface of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]], Wister was killed by its still-active [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasters]]. Kirst mourned his death greatly, and Antilles wrote a letter to his relatives to inform them of his demise.
